# mAI Investments — Greek Golden Visa Properties

> Data-driven advisory and pre-verified real estate for the Greek Golden Visa (EU residency from €250K).

mAI Investments originates and verifies Greek real estate deals for international investors seeking EU residency through the Greek Golden Visa program. Every property is legally pre-vetted, with full advisory support from discovery call to permit issuance (6–9 months).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Greek Golden Visa real estate opportunities.
- [Greek Golden Visa](/greek-golden-visa/): Complete guide to the 2025 Greek Golden Visa program.
- [Requirements](/greek-golden-visa-requirements/): Eligibility, documents, and investment thresholds.
- [€250K Properties](/250k-golden-visa-properties/): Properties qualifying at the €250K threshold.
- [Properties](/properties/): Full catalog of pre-verified Golden Visa properties.
- [Portfolio](/portfolio/): Map view of our property portfolio.
- [Track Record](/trackrecord/): Delivered projects and case studies.
- [Process](/process/): 8-step advisory process from first call to permit.
- [Golden Visa Journey](/golden-visa-journey/): Investor timeline and milestones.
- [Guides](/guides/): In-depth articles on Greek real estate investment.
- [Buy the Lifestyle](/buy-the-lifestyle/): Mediterranean lifestyle through the Golden Visa.
- [Greece vs Portugal](/greece-vs-portugal-golden-visa/): Program comparison.
- [Greece vs Dubai](/greece-vs-dubai-golden-visa/): Program comparison.
- [Is it Worth It?](/is-golden-visa-worth-it/): ROI and qualitative analysis.
- [Family Included](/golden-visa-family-included/): Family member eligibility.
- [Rental Income](/golden-visa-rental-income-properties/): Yield-focused properties.
- [Tax Benefits](/golden-visa-tax-benefits/): Greek tax regime for investors.
- [For Investors](/golden-visa-for-investors/): Investor-focused overview.
- [For High Net Worth](/golden-visa-for-high-net-worth/): HNW-specific guidance.
- [Compliance](/golden-visa-property-compliance/): Legal compliance requirements.
- [By Nationality](/golden-visa-by-nationality/): Country-specific guidance.
